title: RecallResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag recall` on stdout as a single JSON line. backend_invoked and vec_degraded_reason added in v1.0.84 by ADR-0042.

score.description: Cosine similarity in [0, 1] derived as 1 - distance and clamped. Always populated (M-A5 fix in v1.0.40).

graph_depth.description: Number of graph hops between this match and the seed memories. Present only for traversal results.

backend_invoked.description: v1.0.84 (ADR-0042): backend LLM that ran the live embedding for this query (claude, codex, or none). Omitted when embedding was skipped or the response fell back fully to graph.

vec_degraded_reason.description: v1.0.84 (ADR-0042) / v1.0.85 (ADR-0043): structured reason why live embedding degraded. Seven-variant enum discriminates embedding_failed, slot_exhausted (GAP-003), oauth_quota (G58, G45-CR5), backend_mismatch, dim_zero, cancelled, timeout. Omitted when live embedding succeeded. Null when no degradation path was triggered.
